3035900.name: Slide! Demo
3035900.description:
Slide! is a top-down puzzle game where you control both the protagonist and the antagonist, whenever you move he moves alongside you.



Each stage has you thinking of new ways to defeat your opponent, as new items and hazards are introduced along the way.
You'll dodge spikes, pick up swords, get thrown around by arrows, and clash against angry man to defeat him.

the Game Features

  • Over 20 Stages
  • Master levels for those who are up to a challenge beyond the main game
  • Catchy Soundtrack
  • Simple to understand Gameplay with challenging levels
  • Charming Graphics
3035900.supported_languages: 英语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 俄语
